problem id: 8a057351
category: bit_manipulation

rule: (ROT(4) AND NOT SHR(5)) XOR NOT SHL(7)

examples:
  00010000 -> 11111110
  01001100 -> 00111011
  00010001 -> 01101110
  10100100 -> 10110101
  11100001 -> 01100111
  01001101 -> 10101011
  01111111 -> 10001011
  10010110 -> 10010110
  10010100 -> 10110110

query: 11111000
predicted answer: 01110111
